usage: SummaryItem, SourceFilter, ChannelItem types; filterOverlayConfirmMsg, filterOverlayCancelMsg, summariesLoadedMsg, loadSummariesMsg message types
SourceFilter type for filtering summaries by source type and channel
filterOverlayModel for advanced filtering UI (shift+f key)
keys keyMap for key binding constants (Left, Right, Down, Up, Toggle, etc)
style definitions (dateStyle, helpDescStyle, selectedCardStyle, expandedArrowStyle, etc)
newDashboardModel called during app initialization; Update/View called in app event loop
lipgloss.Width for ANSI-aware text width calculation in render layout
